service_class.code:
<?php

namespace App\Services;

use Illuminate\Support\Facades\Http;
use Illuminate\Support\Facades\Log;

class WhatsAppService
{
    protected $baseUrl;
    protected $apiKey;
    protected $instanceId;

    public function __construct()
    {
        $this->baseUrl = config('services.whatsapp_saas.base_url');
        $this->apiKey = config('services.whatsapp_saas.api_key');
        $this->instanceId = config('services.whatsapp_saas.instance_id');
    }

    /**
     * Send text message
     */
    public function sendMessage(string $to, string $message, ?string $instanceId = null): array
    {
        $response = Http::withHeaders([
            'X-API-Key' => $this->apiKey,
            'Content-Type' => 'application/json',
        ])->post("{$this->baseUrl}/api/whatsapp/messages/send", [
            'instance_id' => $instanceId ?? $this->instanceId,
            'to' => $this->formatPhoneNumber($to),
            'type' => 'TEXT',
            'content' => $message,
        ]);

        if ($response->failed()) {
            Log::error('WhatsApp send failed', [
                'to' => $to,
                'error' => $response->json()
            ]);
            throw new \Exception('Failed to send WhatsApp message: ' . $response->body());
        }

        return $response->json();
    }

    /**
     * Send media message (image/video/document)
     */
    public function sendMedia(string $to, string $type, string $mediaUrl, ?string $caption = null): array
    {
        $response = Http::withHeaders([
            'X-API-Key' => $this->apiKey,
        ])->post("{$this->baseUrl}/api/whatsapp/messages/send", [
            'instance_id' => $this->instanceId,
            'to' => $this->formatPhoneNumber($to),
            'type' => strtoupper($type), // IMAGE, VIDEO, DOCUMENT
            'media_url' => $mediaUrl,
            'caption' => $caption,
        ]);

        return $response->json();
    }

    /**
     * Send bulk messages
     */
    public function sendBulk(array $recipients, string $message): array
    {
        $formattedRecipients = array_map(fn($r) => $this->formatPhoneNumber($r), $recipients);

        $response = Http::withHeaders([
            'X-API-Key' => $this->apiKey,
        ])->post("{$this->baseUrl}/api/whatsapp/messages/send-bulk", [
            'instance_id' => $this->instanceId,
            'recipients' => $formattedRecipients,
            'type' => 'TEXT',
            'content' => $message,
        ]);

        return $response->json();
    }

    /**
     * Get instance status
     */
    public function getInstanceStatus(?string $instanceId = null): array
    {
        $response = Http::withHeaders([
            'X-API-Key' => $this->apiKey,
        ])->get("{$this->baseUrl}/api/whatsapp/instances/" . ($instanceId ?? $this->instanceId) . '/status');

        return $response->json();
    }

    /**
     * Format phone number to international format
     */
    protected function formatPhoneNumber(string $phone): string
    {
        // Remove all non-numeric characters
        $phone = preg_replace('/[^0-9]/', '', $phone);

        // If starts with 0, replace with 62 (Indonesia)
        if (str_starts_with($phone, '0')) {
            $phone = '62' . substr($phone, 1);
        }

        // If doesn't start with country code, add 62
        if (!str_starts_with($phone, '62')) {
            $phone = '62' . $phone;
        }

        return $phone;
    }
}

in_controller.code:
<?php

namespace App\Http\Controllers;

use App\Services\WhatsAppService;
use App\Models\Customer;

class CustomerController extends Controller
{
    protected $whatsapp;

    public function __construct(WhatsAppService $whatsapp)
    {
        $this->whatsapp = $whatsapp;
    }

    public function sendNotification(Customer $customer)
    {
        try {
            $result = $this->whatsapp->sendMessage(
                $customer->phone,
                "Halo {$customer->name}, pesanan Anda sedang diproses."
            );

            return response()->json(['success' => true, 'data' => $result]);
        } catch (\Exception $e) {
            return response()->json(['success' => false, 'error' => $e->getMessage()], 500);
        }
    }
}

in_event_listener.description: Kirim WhatsApp otomatis saat event terjadi
in_event_listener.listener_code:
<?php

namespace App\Listeners;

use App\Events\OrderCreated;
use App\Services\WhatsAppService;

class SendOrderWhatsAppNotification
{
    protected $whatsapp;

    public function __construct(WhatsAppService $whatsapp)
    {
        $this->whatsapp = $whatsapp;
    }

    public function handle(OrderCreated $event)
    {
        $order = $event->order;
        $customer = $order->customer;

        $message = "Halo {$customer->name},\n\n";
        $message .= "Pesanan #{$order->order_number} telah kami terima.\n";
        $message .= "Total: Rp " . number_format($order->total, 0, ',', '.');
        $message .= "\n\nTerima kasih!";

        $this->whatsapp->sendMessage($customer->phone, $message);
    }
}

in_notification.channel_code:
<?php

namespace App\Notifications\Channels;

use App\Services\WhatsAppService;
use Illuminate\Notifications\Notification;

class WhatsAppChannel
{
    protected $whatsapp;

    public function __construct(WhatsAppService $whatsapp)
    {
        $this->whatsapp = $whatsapp;
    }

    public function send($notifiable, Notification $notification)
    {
        if (method_exists($notification, 'toWhatsApp')) {
            $message = $notification->toWhatsApp($notifiable);
            
            return $this->whatsapp->sendMessage(
                $notifiable->routeNotificationFor('whatsapp'),
                $message
            );
        }
    }
}
in_notification.notification_code:
<?php

namespace App\Notifications;

use Illuminate\Notifications\Notification;
use App\Notifications\Channels\WhatsAppChannel;

class InvoiceReminder extends Notification
{
    protected $invoice;

    public function __construct($invoice)
    {
        $this->invoice = $invoice;
    }

    public function via($notifiable)
    {
        return [WhatsAppChannel::class];
    }

    public function toWhatsApp($notifiable)
    {
        return "Reminder: Invoice #{$this->invoice->number} jatuh tempo pada {$this->invoice->due_date->format('d M Y')}. Total: Rp " . number_format($this->invoice->total, 0, ',', '.');
    }
}

in_artisan_command.code:
<?php

namespace App\Console\Commands;

use Illuminate\Console\Command;
use App\Services\WhatsAppService;
use App\Models\Invoice;

class SendInvoiceReminders extends Command
{
    protected $signature = 'invoices:remind';
    protected $description = 'Send WhatsApp reminders for due invoices';

    public function handle(WhatsAppService $whatsapp)
    {
        $dueInvoices = Invoice::where('status', 'pending')
            ->whereDate('due_date', '<=', now()->addDays(3))
            ->with('customer')
            ->get();

        foreach ($dueInvoices as $invoice) {
            $whatsapp->sendMessage(
                $invoice->customer->phone,
                "Reminder: Invoice #{$invoice->number} akan jatuh tempo pada {$invoice->due_date->format('d M Y')}."
            );

            $this->info("Sent reminder for invoice #{$invoice->number}");
        }
    }
}

webhook_handling.description: Handle webhook events dari WhatsApp SaaS di Laravel
webhook_handling.controller_code:
<?php

namespace App\Http\Controllers;

use Illuminate\Http\Request;
use Illuminate\Support\Facades\Log;
use App\Models\Message;
use App\Events\WhatsAppMessageReceived;

class WebhookController extends Controller
{
    public function handleWhatsApp(Request $request)
    {
        // Verify webhook signature (optional but recommended)
        $signature = $request->header('X-Webhook-Signature');
        $payload = $request->getContent();
        $expectedSignature = hash_hmac('sha256', $payload, config('services.whatsapp_saas.webhook_secret'));

        if ($signature !== $expectedSignature) {
            Log::warning('Invalid WhatsApp webhook signature');
            return response()->json(['error' => 'Invalid signature'], 401);
        }

        $event = $request->input('event');
        $data = $request->input('data');

        switch ($event) {
            case 'message.received':
                $this->handleIncomingMessage($data);
                break;

            case 'message.sent':
            case 'message.delivered':
            case 'message.read':
                $this->handleMessageStatus($data);
                break;

            case 'connection.update':
                $this->handleConnectionUpdate($data);
                break;

            default:
                Log::info('Unhandled WhatsApp event', ['event' => $event]);
        }

        return response()->json(['success' => true]);
    }

    protected function handleIncomingMessage(array $data)
    {
        // Save to database
        $message = Message::create([
            'wa_message_id' => $data['message_id'],
            'from' => $data['from'],
            'from_name' => $data['from_name'] ?? null,
            'content' => $data['content'],
            'type' => $data['type'],
            'direction' => 'incoming',
            'received_at' => now(),
        ]);

        // Fire event for further processing
        event(new WhatsAppMessageReceived($message));

        Log::info('Incoming WhatsApp message saved', ['id' => $message->id]);
    }

    protected function handleMessageStatus(array $data)
    {
        Message::where('wa_message_id', $data['wa_message_id'])
            ->update(['status' => strtolower($data['status'])]);
    }

    protected function handleConnectionUpdate(array $data)
    {
        Log::info('WhatsApp connection update', $data);
        // Notify admin if disconnected
    }
}

queue_integration.description: Send WhatsApp messages via queue untuk performa lebih baik
queue_integration.job_code:
<?php

namespace App\Jobs;

use App\Services\WhatsAppService;
use Illuminate\Bus\Queueable;
use Illuminate\Contracts\Queue\ShouldQueue;
use Illuminate\Foundation\Bus\Dispatchable;
use Illuminate\Queue\InteractsWithQueue;
use Illuminate\Queue\SerializesModels;

class SendWhatsAppMessage implements ShouldQueue
{
    use Dispatchable, InteractsWithQueue, Queueable, SerializesModels;

    public $tries = 3;
    public $backoff = [10, 30, 60];

    protected $to;
    protected $message;

    public function __construct(string $to, string $message)
    {
        $this->to = $to;
        $this->message = $message;
    }

    public function handle(WhatsAppService $whatsapp)
    {
        $whatsapp->sendMessage($this->to, $this->message);
    }
}

php_integration.code:
<?php

class WhatsAppSaaS
{
    private $baseUrl;
    private $apiKey;
    private $instanceId;

    public function __construct(string $baseUrl, string $apiKey, string $instanceId)
    {
        $this->baseUrl = rtrim($baseUrl, '/');
        $this->apiKey = $apiKey;
        $this->instanceId = $instanceId;
    }

    public function sendMessage(string $to, string $message): array
    {
        return $this->request('POST', '/api/whatsapp/messages/send', [
            'instance_id' => $this->instanceId,
            'to' => $to,
            'type' => 'TEXT',
            'content' => $message,
        ]);
    }

    public function sendMedia(string $to, string $type, string $mediaUrl, ?string $caption = null): array
    {
        return $this->request('POST', '/api/whatsapp/messages/send', [
            'instance_id' => $this->instanceId,
            'to' => $to,
            'type' => $type,
            'media_url' => $mediaUrl,
            'caption' => $caption,
        ]);
    }

    public function getStatus(): array
    {
        return $this->request('GET', "/api/whatsapp/instances/{$this->instanceId}/status");
    }

    private function request(string $method, string $endpoint, array $data = []): array
    {
        $ch = curl_init();

        $url = $this->baseUrl . $endpoint;

        curl_setopt_array($ch, [
            CURLOPT_URL => $url,
            CURLOPT_RETURNTRANSFER => true,
            CURLOPT_HTTPHEADER => [
                'X-API-Key: ' . $this->apiKey,
                'Content-Type: application/json',
                'Accept: application/json',
            ],
        ]);

        if ($method === 'POST') {
            curl_setopt($ch, CURLOPT_POST, true);
            curl_setopt($ch, CURLOPT_POSTFIELDS, json_encode($data));
        }

        $response = curl_exec($ch);
        $httpCode = curl_getinfo($ch, CURLINFO_HTTP_CODE);
        curl_close($ch);

        $result = json_decode($response, true);

        if ($httpCode >= 400) {
            throw new Exception('WhatsApp API Error: ' . ($result['error']['message'] ?? 'Unknown error'));
        }

        return $result;
    }
}

// Usage
$wa = new WhatsAppSaaS(
    'https://your-domain.com',
    'wsa_your_api_key',
    'your-instance-uuid'
);

$result = $wa->sendMessage('6281234567890', 'Hello from PHP!');
print_r($result);

webhook_verification.php_example:
<?php
$signature = $_SERVER['HTTP_X_WEBHOOK_SIGNATURE'] ?? '';
$payload = file_get_contents('php://input');
$secret = 'your-webhook-secret';

$expectedSignature = hash_hmac('sha256', $payload, $secret);

if (!hash_equals($expectedSignature, $signature)) {
    http_response_code(401);
    exit('Invalid signature');
}

// Process webhook...
$data = json_decode($payload, true);

401_unauthorized.solution: Check API key, generate new if needed

403_forbidden.cause: API key doesn't have required permission
403_forbidden.solution: Check API key permissions in dashboard

404_not_found.cause: Wrong endpoint URL or resource doesn't exist
404_not_found.solution: Check API documentation for correct endpoint

429_too_many_requests.solution: Reduce request frequency or upgrade plan

message_failed.cause: Number not on WhatsApp or blocked

webhook_not_receiving.cause: URL not accessible or HTTPS required
webhook_not_receiving.solution: Ensure URL is publicly accessible with valid SSL

api_usage: Implement retry logic with exponential backoff
